days.title: Intro
days.description: Mastering the loop between human intent and AI execution.
days.mindset: You are the Architect. The LLM is your Project Manager. Project IDX is your Lead Developer. You don't need to speak the machine's language fluently; you just need to guide the conversation.

exercises.name: 1. The Kickstart: AI Blueprinting
exercises.note: Describe your vision in plain English to generate a No-Code Implementation Plan.

exercises.name: 2. The Implementation: Anti-Gravity (IDX)
exercises.note: Feed your plan into Project IDX to generate the initial codebase and see a tangible preview instantly.

exercises.name: 3. The Review: Strategic Feedback
exercises.note: Identify changes and describe adjustments back to an LLM to generate a Focused Update Plan.

exercises.name: 4. The Iteration: Refine and Repeat
exercises.note: Move back and forth between the plan and implementation until the project perfectly matches your vision.

days.title: Snippets
days.description: Copy and paste these templates to accelerate your Vibe Coding workflow.

exercises.name: The Architect Kickstart
exercises.content: Act as an Expert Software Architect. Your task is to create a detailed, step-by-step roadmap for a new project. This roadmap must outline features, file structures, and logic—without writing the actual implementation code yet.
exercises.note: Use this for initial project planning.

exercises.name: The Implementation Logic
exercises.content: Based on the provided blueprint, generate the HTML, CSS, and Javascript. Ensure modular structure and clean, readable code. Focus on the core functionality first.
exercises.note: Use this when moving from plan to code.

exercises.name: The Strategic Refinement
exercises.content: Review the current implementation. Identify potential bugs, performance bottlenecks, or aesthetic improvements. Provide a specific, prioritized list of adjustments.
